lesson_title: Travel, Culture and Narratives: Vocabulary Lesson 2
learning_objective: Learners can explain, narrate, give reasons and manage familiar situations in a vocabulary task about technology.
cefr_outcome: Learners can deal with most situations while travelling and produce simple connected text on familiar topics.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise vocabulary for travel, culture and narratives. You will learn useful language connected to technology and practise reported speech basics. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at B1 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: reported speech basics. Vocabulary theme: technology. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At B1, learners should explain, narrate, give reasons and manage familiar situations with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use reported speech basics to talk about technology.
Example 2: The learner gives a B1 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for B1.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using reported speech basics.
options: Correct use of reported speech basics in a B1 sentence.
Incorrect word order with reported speech basics.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses reported speech basics accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of reported speech basics.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the technology phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand technology.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand technology.

distractors: Wrong tense for reported speech basics

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form reported speech basics. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about technology using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: B1 Vocabulary Check - Travel, Culture and Narratives
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short vocabulary task using reported speech basics and vocabulary from technology.
success_criteria: Uses reported speech basics with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses reported speech basics and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to technology.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about technology. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short B1 response about technology. Include the target language: reported speech basics.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for B1-M03-L02. Speaker one: Today we are practising technology. Speaker two: I need to use reported speech basics correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Reported Speech Basics form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for reported speech basics
